name: Lu'ashal
description: While the Lightbloom in Eversong has devastated much of the native wildlife, a few creatures have instead been strengthened by its power. Lu'ashal has grown to gargantuan size from the surging Holy energy and is now as dangerous as it is beautiful.

sections.title: Overview
sections.body_text: Lu'ashal assails foes in a holy frenzy, raining energy from the skies with [Radiant Sunder]  to shatter the ground that  leave [Blinding Fissures] behind. During [Radiant Flare] , she unleashes waves of [Radiant Embers] that tarvel across the battlefield.

sections.title: Healers
sections.body_text:
$bullet; [Dawncrazed Halo] inflicts moderate damage in an area around afflicted players.
$bullet; [Radiant Flare] inflicts substantial damage and casues [Radiant Embers] to erupt from [Blinding Fissures] .

sections.title: Tanks
sections.body_text:
$bullet; [Dawnfire Breath] inflicts heavy Radiant damage in a cone at the primary target.
$bullet; [Radiant Flare] inflicts substantial damage and casues [Radiant Embers] to erupt from [Blinding Fissures] .

sections.title: Damage Dealers
sections.body_text:
$bullet; [Dawncrazed Halo] inflicts moderate damage in an area around afflicted players.
$bullet; [Radiant Flare] inflicts substantial damage and casues [Radiant Embers] to erupt from [Blinding Fissures] .
